nodes.title: Step 7: Play the Anim Montaget if valid.
nodes.comment: Step 7: Play the Anim Montaget if valid.

nodes.title:
Gioca dall'inizio
La destinazione è Timeline Component
Step 6: Configure the Mantle Timeline so that it is the same length as the Lerp/Correction curve minus the starting position, and plays at the same speed as the animation. Then start the timeline.
nodes.comment: Step 6: Configure the Mantle Timeline so that it is the same length as the Lerp/Correction curve minus the starting position, and plays at the same speed as the animation. Then start the timeline.

Step 5: Clear the Character Movement Mode and set the Movement State to Mantling
nodes.comment: Step 5: Clear the Character Movement Mode and set the Movement State to Mantling

nodes.title:
Set Movement Mode
La destinazione è Componente movimento personaggio
Step 4: Calculate the Animated Start Offset from the Target Location. This would be the location the actual animation starts at relative to the Target Transform.
nodes.comment: Step 4: Calculate the Animated Start Offset from the Target Location. This would be the location the actual animation starts at relative to the Target Transform.

nodes.title: Step 3: Set the Mantle Target and calculate the Starting Offset (offset amount between the actor and target transform).
